SEARCH
Module pgl.app
Package pgl.app.model

Class VictimIncident

java.lang.Object
pgl.app.model.Point
pgl.app.model.VictimIncident
public class VictimIncident extends Point
Represents a medical emergency incident on the map topology.

This class extends Point to inherit geometric coordinates ($x$, $y$) and encapsulates the vital medical context required by the routing and scoring engines to determine the optimal hospital assignment under multi-criteria constraints.

Version:
2.0

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    VictimIncident(double x, double y, String incidentId, MedicalSpecialty emergencyType, Integer preferredHospitalId)
    Constructs a VictimIncident with complete medical and structural metadata, including known historical patient data.

  • Constructor Details

    • VictimIncident

      public VictimIncident(double x, double y, String incidentId, MedicalSpecialty emergencyType, Integer preferredHospitalId)
      Constructs a VictimIncident with complete medical and structural metadata, including known historical patient data.
      Parameters:
      x - The X coordinate of the emergency location.
      y - The Y coordinate of the emergency location.
      incidentId - The unique call or dispatch identifier.
      emergencyType - The required medical specialty for treatment.
      preferredHospitalId - The ID of the patient's historical hospital, or null if none.

  • Method Details

    • getIncidentId

      public String getIncidentId()
      Gets the unique tracking identifier of the incident.
      Returns:
      The incident ID string.

    • getEmergencyType

      public MedicalSpecialty getEmergencyType()
      Gets the specific medical emergency type or department required for treatment.
      Returns:
      The required MedicalSpecialty.

    • getMedicalNotes

      public String getMedicalNotes()
      Retrieves the simulated clinical notes and patient anamnesis for this emergency.
      Returns:
      A string describing the medical situation.

    • hasMedicalHistory

      public boolean hasMedicalHistory()
      Checks whether the victim has a recognized medical history linked to a specific healthcare facility.
      Returns:
      true if a preferred hospital ID is available; false otherwise.

    • getPreferredHospitalId

      public Integer getPreferredHospitalId()
      Gets the unique identifier of the hospital where the patient has a historical clinical record.
      Returns:
      The preferred hospital ID, or null if no prior history is registered.

    • getClosestHospital

      public Site getClosestHospital()
      Gets the current assigned closest hospital facility for this incident.
      Returns:
      The assigned Site, or null if unassigned.

    • setClosestHospital

      public void setClosestHospital(Site closestHospital)
      Associates this incident point to its optimized or closest geographical hospital site. * @param closestHospital The target Site representing the assigned facility.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the incident, including its coordinates and assigned hospital.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Point
      Returns:
      A formatted string detailing the structural attributes of this incident.
